first_paragraph: ***The Mighty Anselmo and His Squire*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *Il prode Anselmo e il suo scudiero*) is a 1972 [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") and starring [Alighiero Noschese](/wiki/Alighiero_Noschese "Alighiero Noschese") and [Enrico Montesano](/wiki/Enrico_Montesano "Enrico Montesano").[[1]](#cite_note-Mereghetti-1)[[2]](#cite_note-70-79_z-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1972 Italian film

| The Mighty Anselmo and His Squire | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Written by | [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola")  Bruno Corbucci  [Castellano & Pipolo](/wiki/Castellano_%26_Pipolo "Castellano & Pipolo") |
| Produced by | [Dino De Laurentiis](/wiki/Dino_De_Laurentiis "Dino De Laurentiis") |
| Starring | [Alighiero Noschese](/wiki/Alighiero_Noschese "Alighiero Noschese")  [Enrico Montesano](/wiki/Enrico_Montesano "Enrico Montesano") |
| Cinematography | [Aldo Tonti](/wiki/Aldo_Tonti "Aldo Tonti") |
| Music by | [Guido & Maurizio De Angelis](/wiki/Guido_%26_Maurizio_De_Angelis "Guido & Maurizio De Angelis") |
| Release date | * 1972 (1972) |
| Country | Italy |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***The Mighty Anselmo and His Squire*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *Il prode Anselmo e il suo scudiero*) is a 1972 [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") and starring [Alighiero Noschese](/wiki/Alighiero_Noschese "Alighiero Noschese") and [Enrico Montesano](/wiki/Enrico_Montesano "Enrico Montesano").[[1]](#cite_note-Mereghetti-1)[[2]](#cite_note-70-79_z-2)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Mighty_Anselmo_and_His_Squire&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Wiki_letter_w.svg) | This article **needs a [plot summary](/wiki/Wikipedia:How_to_write_a_plot_summary "Wikipedia:How to write a plot summary").** Please [add one](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=The_Mighty_Anselmo_and_His_Squire&action=edit) in your own words. *(June 2015)* |

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Mighty_Anselmo_and_His_Squire&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Alighiero Noschese](/wiki/Alighiero_Noschese "Alighiero Noschese") as Anselmo da Montebello
* [Enrico Montesano](/wiki/Enrico_Montesano "Enrico Montesano") as Gianpuccio Senzaterra
* [Erminio Macario](/wiki/Erminio_Macario "Erminio Macario") as Frà Prosdocimo Zatterin from [San Donà di Piave](/wiki/San_Don%C3%A0_di_Piave "San Donà di Piave")
* [Mario Carotenuto](/wiki/Mario_Carotenuto "Mario Carotenuto") as Bishop of Montebello
* [Lino Banfi](/wiki/Lino_Banfi "Lino Banfi") as Fra Prosdocimo's Servant
* [Renzo Montagnani](/wiki/Renzo_Montagnani "Renzo Montagnani") as Ottone di Buldoffen
* Tamara Baroni as Gerbina
* [Maria Baxa](/wiki/Mar%C3%ADa_Baxa "María Baxa") as Fiammetta
* [Femi Benussi](/wiki/Femi_Benussi "Femi Benussi") as Laura
* Sandro Dori as The Peasant
* Marie Sophie as Leonzia
* [Ignazio Leone](/wiki/Ignazio_Leone "Ignazio Leone") as Bishop at the Execution
* Mimmo Poli as The Innkeeper
* Marcello Martana as Marcozzo
